slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '소아 응급 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, no decoration. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '이 증상 있으면' white bold Pretendard, '응급실 가세요' bright red #E63946 bold. Small white subtitle below: '생명을 지키는 응급 판단 기준 · AAP 가이드라인'. Center-right: LARGE prominent line illustration of ambulance with emergency medical cross white outline on dark background, clean minimal strokes. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 015'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small Pretendard, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small red #E63946 rounded label: '신생아·영아 긴급'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '생후 60일 미만 아기' white bold, '38도 이상 열' bright red #E63946 bold. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION of baby thermometer icon white outline minimal. Below illustration: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. White text COMPACT: '생후 8일~60일 영아 38℃ 이상 열 → 패혈증 등 중증 세균 감염 위험평가 필요'. Thin white divider. White text COMPACT: '생후 28일 미만 신생아 38℃ 이상 → 즉시 응급실'. Red outlined box around card comfortable padding. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '이 호흡 증상은' white bold, '지체하지 마세요' red #E63946 bold. Center: stacked rows GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION of nose icon left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right '코벌렁거림 nasal flaring'. Row 2: SMALL ICON of ribs left (red ❌ overlay) + white text '늑골 사이 함몰 chest indrawing'. Row 3: SMALL ICON of sound wave left (red ❌ overlay) + white text '그렁거리는 소리 grunting'. Row 4: SMALL ICON of lips left (red ❌ overlay) + white text '청색증 입술 파래짐'. Red outlined box around all rows comfortable padding. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '경련 긴급 119'. Headline COMPACT: '경련 시' white bold, '119 신호' red #E63946 bold. Center top: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION ambulance icon white outline prominent. Below: numbered items GENEROUS spacing. Red circle '1' + white text COMPACT '경련 5분 이상 지속'. Red circle '2' + white text '경련 후 의식 회복 안 됨'. Red circle '3' + white text '연속 경련 발생'. Red circle '4' + white text '처음 경련 또는 물에서 경련'. Red circle '5' + white text '경련 중 호흡곤란'. Large red rounded border around all items comfortable padding. Bottom red glow subtle. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '중증 탈수 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '이 증상은' white bold, '쇼크 위험' red #E63946 bold. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION of water drop with alert icon white outline minimal. Below: stacked rows GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL ICON of brain left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right '의식 저하 altered mental status'. Row 2: SMALL ICON of sleepy face left (red ❌) + white text '무기력 lethargy'. Row 3: SMALL ICON of lungs left (red ❌) + white text '빠른 호흡 hyperpnea'. Row 4: SMALL ICON of heart left (red ❌) + white text '저혈압 hypotension'. Row 5: SMALL ICON of skin left (red ❌) + white text '피부 얼룩 skin mottling'. Red outlined box around all rows. Bottom text white small: '후기 징후 → 응급 수액 소생술 필요'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '의식 변화 긴급'. Headline COMPACT: '의식 이상은' white bold, '의학적 응급' red #E63946 bold. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION of head with alert icon white outline minimal. Below: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. White text bold small: '의식 변화 징후'. Thin white divider. White text COMPACT list GENEROUS spacing: '혼돈·지남력 상실 / 초조·무기력 / 의식 소실'. Thin divider. White text bold small: '주요 원인'. White text COMPACT: 'CNS 감염(뇌수막염·뇌염) / 외상성 뇌손상 / 대사 장애·경련·중독'. Red outlined box around card. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint #2EC4B6 rounded label: 'WHO 응급 징후 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '이것만 기억하세요' white bold, '4가지 신호' mint bold. Center: stacked rows GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION icon left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right '경련 발생'. Row 2: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓) + white text '음료를 마실 수 없음'. Row 3: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓) + white text '의식 저하·졸림'. Row 4: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓) + white text '모든 것을 토함'. Mint outlined box around rows. Below: small white text '추가: 경직된 목·중증 탈수·조용한 stridor·양발 부종'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '즉시 연락 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '이 증상과 함께' white bold, '발열 시 응급' red #E63946 bold. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION of phone with emergency cross icon white outline prominent. Below: stacked rows GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL ICON of lips left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right '청색증 입술·손발 파래짐'. Row 2: SMALL ICON of lungs left (red ❌) + white text '심한 호흡곤란'. Row 3: SMALL ICON of body left (red ❌) + white text '축 늘어져 반응 없음'. Row 4: SMALL ICON of water drop left (red ❌) + white text '소변·수분 섭취 불가'. Red outlined box around all rows comfortable padding. Bottom text white small: '즉시 의료진 상담 또는 119'. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small Pretendard, no quotes, no decoration. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT center: '오늘 확인하고' white bold, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 bold with thin mint underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. White text small bold: '출처'. White text COMPACT list: '· AAP Pediatrics 2021 Febrile Infants 8-60 Days' newline '· WHO IMCI Danger Signs 2019' newline '· CDC Seizure First Aid 2025' newline '· StatPearls Pediatric Dehydration 2024'. Thin white horizontal divider. Center: '소아과언니' white bold large Pretendard, NO quotes NO decoration. Small gray below: 'DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의'. Thin white horizontal divider. White text: '@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드'. Mint text: '소아과수첩 앱 · 야간·달빛병원 바로 찾기'. No pixel values as text. No quotes anywhere on card.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
